free_text: Deuteron break-up in the fields of nuclei at 56 MeV
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Department of Physics
- Target enrichment: Natural or isotopically enriched
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 1.39 to 7.03 mg/cm**2.
- Target is self supported.
AVF cyclotron at Research Center for
Nuclear Physics
Solid angle of detector is 0.23,0.69 msr.
To detect proton
Statistical error is well below systematic error.
Maximum uncertainty in target thickness,
charge measurements, target impurities etc.
